SOURCE: 20237244.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (20237244.pdf)
SUMMARY: Information Security Analyst/Systems professional with over 16 years of experience in IT systems analysis, troubleshooting, management, and testing. Experienced in Cyber Security, Intrusion detection analysis, System Administration, and Military Cyber Operations.
SKILLS: Windows, Unix, Linux, VMWare, Wireshark, Snort, TCPDump, EnCase, Bash Programming, configuring routers and switches, computer networking, Intrusion analysis, Firewalls

SOURCE: 20237244.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Specialist
COMPANY: Current Company Name
DATES: 05/2009 - Present
DESCRIPTION: Provide electronic surveillance of information systems, perform digital evidence analysis (DEA), and provide technical analytical support to computer surveillance activities. Provide traffic analysis against adversary's tactics, techniques, and protocols. Configure and install routers, switches, and wireless controllers. Draft training materials and organize training sessions for 6 employees.

SOURCE: 20237244.pdf
JOB TITLE: Network Security Analyst
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 08/2008 - 05/2009
DESCRIPTION: Analyzed software, hardware, and network systems for various transmission systems. Identified, reported, and resolved network security violations.

SOURCE: 20237244.pdf
JOB TITLE: Corporate Security
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 11/2007 - 08/2008
DESCRIPTION: Ensured compliance with industry standards such as PCI, HIPAA, ISO 27001, and Sarbanes-Oxley. Responded to client requests for technical support.

SOURCE: 20237244.pdf
JOB TITLE: Network Security Analyst
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 11/2003 - 11/2007
DESCRIPTION: Identified and responded to threats against Air Force networks. Provided immediate analysis and verification of network activity using ASIM and CIDS. Detected intrusions and applied countermeasures. Analyzed trends in network activity. Provided daily reports.
